name: Token Score
summary: Measures how much supported tokens a wallet holds, while giving less weight to recently received tokens. Each token lot gains value gradually over time until it reaches full value after the selected holding period.
description:
### What this algorithm is
This algorithm measures a wallet's supported token holdings while giving more credit to tokens that have been held longer.

Each incoming token transfer creates a separate lot. A new lot starts with zero value when it is received, then gains value steadily over time until it reaches full value after the configured maturation threshold.

### How value is calculated
For each remaining lot:

- The lot's age is measured in days.
- The lot's value grows linearly from 0 to 100% over the maturation threshold.
- Once the lot reaches the threshold, it counts at full value.

The final wallet score is the sum of all remaining lot values across all selected supported tokens.

### Multiple purchases and sales
- Every incoming transfer is treated as a separate lot.
- Outgoing transfers consume the oldest remaining lots first (FIFO).
- After all transfers up to the snapshot run time are applied, the algorithm calculates the value of the remaining lots.

### Snapshot time
No snapshot time input is required. The evaluation time is the snapshot run timestamp recorded by the snapshot system.

### Supported assets
Users can select from supported chain/token combinations only. For MVP, the only supported option is FET.ai on Ethereum.

### What data is used
No file upload is needed. The algorithm reads indexed token transfer history from the database populated by the onchain-data-service.

### Outputs
- A per-wallet CSV with wallet_address and token_score.
- A JSON details file with per-token and per-lot calculations, including FIFO depletion and intermediate values.

inputs.label: Maturation Threshold
inputs.description: Number of days a token lot must be held before it reaches full value.

inputs.label: Supported Tokens
inputs.description: One or more supported chain/token pairs to include. All selected tokens are combined into one final score.

properties.label: Chain
properties.description: Blockchain network for the selected supported token.

properties.label: Token
properties.description: Supported token contract on the selected chain.

outputs.label: Token Score by Wallet Address
outputs.description: Per-wallet CSV with columns: wallet_address, token_score.

outputs.label: Token Score Details (JSON)
outputs.description: Full per-wallet breakdown including token-level and lot-level calculations, transfers used, FIFO lot depletion, lot ages in days, remaining amounts, and intermediate values. For debugging and auditing.
